description_long: This is a rectangular box of Nestlé Sahne-Nuss snacks, featuring a predominantly yellow background with circular patterns and a playful squirrel mascot on the front and side. The front face displays the brand name 'SAHNE-NUSS' in bold red letters, accompanied by a bowl of chocolate-covered cereal balls. The back of the box provides a detailed product description in Spanish, highlighting the chocolate and almond content, and includes a barcode and product icons. One side panel contains a comprehensive nutrition facts label and additional product information. The box appears to be made of cardboard, with glossy printed graphics and sealed edges, typical for snack packaging. The overall design is bright and inviting, with clear branding and product imagery.
description: A yellow rectangular Nestlé Sahne-Nuss snack box with a squirrel mascot, bold branding, and images of chocolate cereal balls. Features detailed product and nutritional information on the back and side panels.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Nestlé Sahne-Nuss branding, a squirrel mascot, and a bowl of chocolate cereal balls on a yellow patterned background.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the squirrel mascot and Nestlé logo on a yellow background, with no text or product imagery.
description_view_2: The back view features a Spanish product description, a chocolate bar image, barcode, and product icons on the yellow patterned background.
description_view_3: The right side view presents the nutrition facts panel and additional product information in black and white on the yellow background.
attribute_brand_logo: Nestlé logo is visible on the front and left side, featuring a red oval with white text and a stylized bird, located near the top of the box.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front and back show images of chocolate cereal balls and a chocolate bar, with text referencing chocolate and almonds.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the right side of the box, listing calories, ingredients, and other nutritional information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A squirrel mascot is present on the front and left side, serving as a playful promotional graphic.
